name: @qmlts/host
description: QmlTS native host - napi-rs bridge for Qt QML engine

scripts.build: bunx @napi-rs/cli@3.0.0-alpha.65 build --manifest-path ../../crates/qmlts-host/Cargo.toml --package-json-path package.json --output-dir . --platform --release --no-js --features napi && bun scripts/restore-types.mjs
scripts.build:debug: bunx @napi-rs/cli@3.0.0-alpha.65 build --manifest-path ../../crates/qmlts-host/Cargo.toml --package-json-path package.json --output-dir . --platform --no-js --features napi && bun scripts/restore-types.mjs
